violations.text: The following equipment was observed to be in poor repair: - Two cutting boards in the food prep area were observed to be very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. - A wire strainer was observed to be frayed. Cutting boards and the wire strainer were voluntarily disposed of by the PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the ALZ Servery. High Temp. Dish Machine testing device was ordered by the PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - Deli Slicer - Storage shelf under tables - Gasket and base area to the low boy freezer New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

A drainpipe or water line in the cookline area behind the steamer was observed draining onto the floor behind the unit. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. (Floor drain observed located in proximity of the steam unit draining pipe) New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2026

Areas of the kitchen wall, floor, and wall/floor juncture tiles were observed in need of repair: - The walls were observed to have cracked or missing corner joint pieces - Floor/wall juncture tiles were observed cracked/chipped - Tiles in areas of the kitchen were observed to be cracked Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. (Per the PIC, a resurfacing of the floor is to be conducted in the near future.) New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
